items.title: National Debt Commissioners Act 1818
items.description: An Act to empower any Three or more of the Commissioners for the Reduction of the National Debt to exercise all the Powers and Authorities given to the said Commissioners by any Act or Acts of Parliament.

items.title: Vestries Act 1818 (repealed 1.6.1992)
items.description: [An Act for the regulation of Parish Vestries.
